name: Alfred
description: Productivity app for macOS that boosts efficiency with hotkeys, keywords, file search, and custom workflows.

seo.title: Alfred — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Alfred: Productivity app for macOS that boosts efficiency with hotkeys, keywords, file search, and custom workflows.

when_to_use: Custom macOS workflow to open dev environments instantly
Keyboard-driven file search across project directories
Snippet expansion for boilerplate code and email replies
Automating repetitive file operations via custom scripts
Quick-launch tool integrating with CLI tools via hotkeys

cons: macOS only, no Windows or Linux
Raycast now offers similar features free
review.verdict: Still the gold standard macOS launcher if you value stability and scripting over Raycasts newer polish.
review.best_for: Mac power users who script workflows and want a proven, stable launcher
review.not_for: Cross-platform users or those avoiding paid upgrades for basic features

developer_experience.reason: macOS-only; workflow API decent but platform-specific
